name: importlens-accuracy-real-fixtures
description: Pinned real-world packages the accuracy suite and the candidate qualification suites install on demand. Exact direct versions are not enough on their own: css-tree depends on source-map-js through a caret range, so the committed pnpm-lock.yaml is what keeps before/after byte counts comparable across an OXC upgrade. Each package is here for one reason; daemon/tests/candidate_badges.rs names it beside the row that depends on it.
